_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: the expression of MMP1 protein was significantly decreased in NFFs compared with that in HEFs...significant amounts of MMP1 protein were detected in the supernatants of HEFs, while NFFs did not release detectable amounts
details: NFFs showed significantly decreased MMP1 protein expression compared to HEFs, with no detectable MMP1 release in supernatants
